text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O and I are on our way back to the
academy, when...

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: O-Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I recognize you... We met the other day!

text_block_list.name: Nurse
text_block_list.text:
I'm terribly sorry, but she insisted on speaking
with you.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That is no problem at all. Nothing makes me
happier than granting a princess's wishes.

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: O-Opera O... Ah... Um... Ngh...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Is my gaze too much for you to bear? Is the
glimmer in my eyes the cause for your anxiety?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Alas, what am I to do? All this because of my
wondrous eyes!
choice_data_list: What if we took a little walk while we talked?

text_block_list.name: Nurse
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yes, that would be very good for her. But
please keep it short. I'll be waiting here.

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: Opera O... Is that your school?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It is, indeed. This is where I diligently study and
hone my beauty alongside my friends.

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: You... work hard. Really hard, huh?

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: I knew it... I never could... Hic... Sniffle!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Princess?! What troubles you?

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: I knew I'd never... sniffle... sparkle like you... Sob... Hic...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
No, allow me to handle this! Look after the
princess, just for a moment!

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text:
I wanna... be just like Opera O. I wanna get
better... and sparkle...

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text:
B-but... s-surgery is too scary. I can't be like her...
So I... That's why I wanted to talk.

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Is she... scared of anything?

Things that frighten T.M. Opera O... That's a hard
question.

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: Oh... Yeah... She's very pretty...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha! Trainer, say that again, but boldly and
in my presence!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
As if I heard a call from the secret garden, I
suddenly had to speak with the nurse.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and Princess, do you know what the key to
beauty is?

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: Key?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The answer is to bask in my presence! This light
that has brought hope to untold masses!

With that, T.M. Opera O hands the girl a small
mirror.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Here, take my hand mirror. Now have a gander at
your reflection.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The girl in that mirror is beautiful. Yes... you are
sparkling!

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: I am? I... sparkle?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The mirror does not lie! You simply had yet to
notice it!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hold onto it until the shine is evident to your own
eyes. Indulge until you tire of looking!

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: ...I sparkle, too. Ehehe! Maybe... you're right!

And so, with her eyes fixed on the mirror, and a
big smile across her face, the girl returns to the
hospital with the nurse.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The nurse told me she's scheduled to have
surgery.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The procedure isn't life threatening, but that
doesn't change how frightful it is. We should go
visit her that day.

T.M. Opera O and I watch on as the girl's tiny
frame disappears in the distance.

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: Opera O's amazing. But I'm just a scaredy cat...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What reason do you have to be so crestfallen?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, I returned but moments ago. The nurse
should be here shortly.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to repeat myself, Princess. There is no
need for the long face.

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Tell me, Princess. Who is reflected in your eyes
this very moment?

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: Um... Y-you?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Precisely! I, the epitome of beauty, am in your
eyes!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Therefore... there is no space left for fright!

I can't make heads or tails of what she's saying,
but the girl's face brightens as she looks up at
Opera O.

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text:
I get it... Things can't be scary if I think about
you!

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text:
Oh... But... I wonder if I'll remember when I get
scared.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I've just the thing. How about this?
With that, she hands the girl a small hand mirror.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That mirror has reflected my beauty day in and
day out. I have two, so this one I lend to you.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My presence resides within it—a reminder of me
whenever you look upon it.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And it can bring out a radiance of your very own! Such as the moon is illuminated by the sun!

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: O-okay! Ehehe... I've got Opera O's mirror!

And so, the girl returns to the hospital with the
nurse.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The nurse told me she's scheduled to have
surgery.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The procedure isn't life threatening, but this
doesn't change how frightful it is. We should go
visit her that day.

T.M. Opera O and I watch on as the girl's tiny
frame disappears in the distance.
